title.en: Ensure filesystem integrity is regularly checked

prose.en: Ensure filesystem integrity is regularly checked

description.en: Periodic checking of the filesystem integrity is needed to detect changes to the filesystem.

rationale.en: Periodic file checking allows the system administrator to determine on a regular basis if critical files have been changed in an unauthorized fashion.

audit.en:
Run the following command to unmask `dailyaidecheck.timer` and `dailyaidecheck.service`:  

Run the following command to enable and start `dailyaidecheck.timer`:

```
# systemctl --now enable dailyaidecheck.timer
```

```
# systemctl unmask dailyaidecheck.timer dailyaidecheck.service
```

remediation.en:
Run the following command to unmask `dailyaidecheck.timer` and `dailyaidecheck.service`:  

Run the following command to enable and start `dailyaidecheck.timer`:

```
# systemctl --now enable dailyaidecheck.timer
```

```
# systemctl unmask dailyaidecheck.timer dailyaidecheck.service
```
